allow: Bash(mysql -u root monjeu -e "ALTER TABLE joueurs ADD COLUMN email_verifie TINYINT\(1\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN code_verification VARCHAR\(6\) NULL, ADD COLUMN code_expiration DATETIME NULL;")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./db'\); db.query\('ALTER TABLE joueurs_map ADD COLUMN construction_queue TEXT DEFAULT \\\\'[]\\\\'', err => { console.log\(err ? 'Colonne existe déjà ou erreur: ' + err.message : 'OK: construction_queue ajouté'\); db.end?.\(\); process.exit\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db = require\('./db'\); db.query\('ALTER TABLE joueurs_map ADD COLUMN construction_queue TEXT DEFAULT \\\\'[]\\\\'', err => { console.log\(err ? 'Info: ' + err.message : 'OK: construction_queue ajouté'\); process.exit\(\); }\);")
